body.title: Granny Weatherwax: register with web server so she appears in UI
body.result: GrannyShim.start/stop register/deregister with /api/agents/register; 10 existing tests green
body.description:
GrannyWeatherwaxDevice is not visible in the web interface because GrannyShim.start() never calls POST /api/agents/register. Every other rack device that appears in the web UI registers via the adc_client pattern (devices/igor/web/adc_client.py:252). Granny is currently a library (not a daemon), so registration must happen in GrannyShim.start() via a direct HTTP call or by using the adc_client.

Fix: in GrannyShim.start(), POST to the web server's /api/agents/register with agent_id='granny-weatherwax' and capabilities=['intake_ticket', 'route_ticket', 'escalate_to_cc']. Mirror the pattern in igor's adc_client. In GrannyShim.stop(), call /api/agents/deregister.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/shim.py
**Design rules:** none — shim registration is infrastructure, not cognition
**Scope boundary:** only GrannyShim.start/stop. Do not change GrannyWeatherwaxDevice.
**Test plan:** after fix, start Granny shim and verify GET /health shows granny-weatherwax in attached_agents list
